text.title: ICP Fit Scorecard Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: 80-customer SaaS run yielding 28 keep / 44 nurture / 8 remove.

section.title: Setup
section.p: Solo founder, project-management SaaS, 80 active customers across 4 tiers. ICP persona: "solo devs and 2-5 person studios shipping to prod weekly". Goal: cull the 8 highest-support customers ahead of a Q3 price change.

section.title: Sample row — keep band
Sample row — remove band
Histogram + decision
section.p: Histogram published in the founder's internal log. Build-update post: "After quarterly ICP scoring, we are sunsetting 8 accounts and doubling down on the 28 in the keep band. Median score moves from 51 to 58 next quarter."

section.title: Remove execution
section.p: Sunset emails sent to 7 of 8; 1 documented exception (long-term customer with reviewer "founder" and reason "long-tail referral source"). Refund offer attached. Grace period 30 days.

text.example: 80 customers (≥30) → persona doc available → 5 signals scored with evidence → band derived from total → histogram published → 8 removes scheduled within 30d → quarterly re-score on calendar; APPROVE via run-the-checklist.
